architecture.rationale: Three consistent Mermaid diagrams, explicit dependency-direction rule, layer boundaries, multiple design rationales; minor label drift in flowchart paths.
recommendations: Align boot-flowchart node labels with the literal Data/agent paths used in prose

specs_detail.rationale: All 3 feature files have I/O, edge cases, Implementation paths; two include diagrams; outputs sometimes implicit in structured lists.
recommendations: Add an explicit Outputs subsection per module in 02_python-server.md

rules_clarity.rationale: About 30 concrete NEVER/ALWAYS rules naming exact APIs and paths; no contradictions; a few Process items are statements rather than rules.
recommendations: Rephrase Process section items as ALWAYS rules or move them to architecture.md

tech_stack.rationale: Capped: no manifest yet backs Active Dependencies (pyproject pending in EUD-009); versions otherwise grounded in measured ECA venv.
recommendations: Land server/pyproject.toml (EUD-009) then re-run Phase 0 grounding to lift the manifest cap

verification.rationale: Lint, test, project-specific smoke and manual e2e stages with stated purposes; absent type and build stages not explicitly justified.
recommendations: Add one-line justifications naming the absent type and build stages
Consider a mypy stage once server modules stabilize
